notes: C/C++ Win32 application framework; superceded by later Lawson Insight and web UIs.
Multi-level workflow architecture (personal/departmental/enterprise); integrated into Process Suites.
Used by OED to support Windows 95 and NT 32-bit multitasking environments.
Planned for future OED release for Internet application deployment.
Used by OED for email integration; VIM support planned for v7.0.
Third-party workflow engine supported as Lawson plug-in.
Inter-application data exchange mechanisms referenced for Windows integration.
